heading: Transferred
label: 63a to 63d Transferred
notes: CodificationSections 63a to 63d, , §§ 1–4, , which were transferred to sections 1314b to 1314e, respectively, of Title 48, Territories and Insular Possessions, were subsequently repealed by , .act June 19, 1934, ch. 65748 Stat. 1116act Aug. 10, 1949, ch. 415, § 9(d)63 Stat. 597Section 63a, , , which authorized President to make rules and regulations with respect to alcoholic beverages in Canal Zone, was transferred to .act June 19, 1934, ch. 657, § 148 Stat. 1116section 1314b of Title 48Section 63b, , , which related to punishment for violation of any rules and regulations, was transferred to .act June 19, 1934, ch. 657, § 248 Stat. 1116section 1314c of Title 48Section 63c, , , which related to repeal of prior laws, was transferred to .act June 19, 1934, ch. 657, § 348 Stat. 1116section 1314d of Title 48Section 63d, , , which related to effective date of sections 63a to 63d of this title, was transferred to .act June 19, 1934, ch. 657, § 448 Stat. 1116section 1314e of Title 48
